";

  function b64ToBuffer(b64) {
    const binStr = atob(b64);
    const bytes = new Uint8Array(binStr.length);
    for (let i = 0; i < binStr.length; i++) {
      bytes[i] = binStr.charCodeAt(i);
    }
    return bytes.buffer;
  }

  console.log("Uploading index.html to R2...");
  const res1 = await cloudflare.request({
    method: "PUT",
    path: `/accounts/${accountId}/r2/buckets/${bucketName}/objects/index.html`,
    body: b64ToBuffer(indexHtmlB64),
    rawBody: true,
    contentType: "text/html; charset=utf-8"
  });

  console.log("Uploading app.js to R2...");
  const res2 = await cloudflare.request({
    method: "PUT",
    path: `/accounts/${accountId}/r2/buckets/${bucketName}/objects/app.js`,
    body: b64ToBuffer(appJsB64),
    rawBody: true,
    contentType: "application/javascript; charset=utf-8"
  });

  return { res1, res2 };
}
